result.markdown:
--- title: "2. Transaction Segmentation" subtitle: "RFM-Style Behavioral Feature Segmentation" --- ## Framing Transaction segmentation usually starts with customer-level feature engineering rather than raw order lines. Common features include: - recency, - purchase frequency, - monetary value, - average order value, - discount reliance, - category breadth. This section generates synthetic **RFM-style** data plus two additional behavioral variables. ## Generate synthetic transaction features ::: {#cell-txn-generate .cell execution_count=2} ::: {#txn-generate .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=2} ```{=html}
true_segment recency_days purchase_frequency monetary_value discount_share category_breadth avg_order_value
0 Dormant Discount 233.712269 2.368862 133.639210 0.694712 1.772206 37.634180
1 Dormant Discount 173.200715 2.848776 123.589361 0.776227 2.109718 47.154801
2 Dormant Discount 253.770304 4.451013 114.839513 0.590812 1.586901 54.751447
3 Dormant Discount 262.325412 4.576981 175.589664 0.755263 1.513246 24.187327
4 Dormant Discount 132.203417 2.569381 98.222739 0.911295 1.864648 58.337862
``` ::: ::: ## Create transformed modeling features ::: {#cell-txn-transform .cell execution_count=3} ::: {#txn-transform .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=3} ```{=html}
recency_log purchase_frequency monetary_log discount_share category_breadth avg_order_log

``` ::: ::: ## Visualize the transaction segments ::: {#cell-txn-pca .cell execution_count=7} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ![](transaction_files/figure-html/txn-pca-output-1.png){#txn-pca width=600 height=449} ::: ::: ## Profile the transaction segments ::: {#cell-txn-profile .cell execution_count=8} ::: {#txn-profile .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=8} ```{=html}
segment_rank recency_days purchase_frequency monetary_value discount_share category_breadth avg_order_value
segment
1 1 14.17 23.85 2280.21 0.07 5.82 160.94
0 2 54.43 9.76 654.33 0.27 3.56 78.50
2 3 217.72 2.49 121.84 0.72 1.73 48.57
``` ::: ::: ## Cross-tab against the latent transaction segments ::: {#cell-txn-crosstab .cell execution_count=9} ::: {#txn-crosstab .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=9} ```{=html}
true_segment Dormant Discount High Value Loyal Steady Midvalue
segment
0 0 0 150
1 0 150 0
2 150 0 0
``` ::: ::: ## Interpretation A typical business reading might be: - high-recency, low-frequency, high-discount customers are **at-risk bargain buyers**, - medium-value and medium-frequency customers are **core mainstream buyers**, - low-recency, high-frequency, high-spend customers are **premium loyalists**.
